events.name: New York Knicks at Detroit Pistons

headlines.description: — Karl-Anthony Towns was aggressive early and Jalen Brunson was effective late.
headlines.shortLinkText: Towns scores 31, Brunson has 30 and Knicks beat Pistons 118-116 for a 2-1 lead in series

events.name: Oklahoma City Thunder at Memphis Grizzlies

headlines.description: — Chet Holmgren scored all but one of his 24 points in the second half and the Oklahoma City Thunder overcame a 29-point deficit after <a...
headlines.shortLinkText: Thunder rally from 29 points down after Morant leaves with injury, top Grizzlies for 3-0 series lead

headlines.description: — After two close games to open the playoffs, the Los Angeles Clippers came home and had their way with the Denver Nuggets.
headlines.shortLinkText: Leonard and Harden lead Clippers to easy 117-83 win over Jokic and Nuggets for a 2-1 series lead
